# DullyPDF

> AI-powered PDF form automation: convert existing PDFs into fillable templates, fill them from data, collect answers by web form or API, and add U.S. e-signatures.

DullyPDF turns raw PDFs into reusable fillable templates using AI field detection. It is built for recurring document workflows — not one-time edits or page redesign. Upload a PDF, review detected fields, clean the template in the editor, then fill it from structured data, respondent submissions, or API calls.

## Core Workflows

- [PDF to Fillable Form](https://dullypdf.com/pdf-to-fillable-form): Upload a raw PDF, detect candidate fields with AI, refine geometry and names in the editor, and save a reusable template.
- [Search & Fill from CSV](https://dullypdf.com/fill-pdf-from-csv): Map PDF fields to CSV, Excel, JSON, or TXT schema headers, then search rows and fill the template. Data stays in the browser.
- [Fill By Link](https://dullypdf.com/fill-pdf-by-link): Publish a hosted web form for respondents to answer. Their responses fill the PDF when the owner generates it.
- [API Fill](https://dullypdf.com/pdf-fill-api): Expose a template-scoped JSON-to-PDF endpoint with auth key management, rate limiting, and schema downloads.
- [E-Sign Workflow](https://dullypdf.com/esign-ueta-pdf-workflow): Route filled PDFs into email-based signature requests with immutable record freezing under U.S. E-SIGN and UETA.
- [Fill from Images](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/fill-from-images): Upload photos of IDs, invoices, or scanned documents and let AI vision extract data into template fields.
- [Batch Fill](https://dullypdf.com/batch-fill-pdf-forms): Fill multiple records or entire document packets from a single data source.

## Detection and Editing

- AI field detection uses the CommonForms model with confidence scoring for text, checkbox, radio, date, and signature fields.
- The visual editor supports resize, rename, reposition, type normalization, checkbox group management, and radio button editing.
- OpenAI-powered Rename + Map aligns field names to schema headers automatically.

## Industry Solutions

- [Healthcare](https://dullypdf.com/healthcare-pdf-automation): Medicare enrollment, patient-health claims and appeals, dental intake, and HIPAA-adjacent healthcare workflows.
- [Insurance](https://dullypdf.com/insurance-pdf-automation): ACORD 25/24/27/28/126/140 certificates and carrier-specific forms.
- [ACORD Forms](https://dullypdf.com/acord-form-automation): Certificate of insurance and ACORD-first workflows.
- [Real Estate](https://dullypdf.com/real-estate-pdf-automation): Rental applications, lease agreements, mortgage packets.
- [Government](https://dullypdf.com/government-form-automation): Permits, tax forms, licensing applications.
- [Finance & Loans](https://dullypdf.com/finance-loan-pdf-automation): Loan applications and financial disclosure workflows.
- [HR & Onboarding](https://dullypdf.com/hr-pdf-automation): New hire paperwork, benefits enrollment, compliance forms.
- [Legal](https://dullypdf.com/legal-pdf-workflow-automation): Contracts, filings, and case packet automation.
- [Education](https://dullypdf.com/education-form-automation): Student applications and enrollment workflows.
- [Nonprofit](https://dullypdf.com/nonprofit-pdf-form-automation): Grant applications, volunteer intake, donor forms.
- [Logistics](https://dullypdf.com/logistics-pdf-automation): Bills of lading, delivery receipts, transport paperwork.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/getting-started): End-to-end quick start from upload to filled PDF.
- [Detection](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/detection): Field detection confidence, cleanup, and review.
- [Editor Workflow](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/editor-workflow): Editor tools, field properties, and template refinement.
- [Rename & Mapping](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/rename-mapping): AI field renaming and schema alignment.
- [Search & Fill](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/search-fill): Row-based filling from structured data sources.
- [Fill By Link](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/fill-by-link): Respondent form publishing and answer collection.
- [API Fill](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/api-fill): Endpoint management, auth keys, and schema.
- [Signature Workflow](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/signature-workflow): Signing process, guardrails, and compliance scope.
- [Template Groups](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/create-group): Batch operations across document packets.
- [Fill from Images](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/fill-from-images): Vision-based extraction from photos and scanned documents.
- [Save & Download](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/save-download-profile): Template persistence, profiles, and collaboration.
- [Troubleshooting](https://dullypdf.com/usage-docs/troubleshooting): Detection, mapping, and fill issue diagnosis.

## Plans

- **Free**: 5 saved forms, 5 detect pages, 50 fillable pages, 25 Fill By Link responses/month, 1 API endpoint (250 fills/month), 25 signing requests/month.
- **Premium**: 100 saved forms, 100 detect pages, 1,000 fillable pages, 10,000 Fill By Link responses/month, 20 API endpoints (10,000 fills/month), 10,000 signing requests/month.
